name: All In One Golf Academy
address: 855 Hedding Jacksonville Rd Suite A, Mt Holly, NJ 08060
about: All In One Golf Academy is an indoor golf facility located within the Springfield Golf Center in Mount Holly, New Jersey. The venue provides a space for practice and play using a Trackman 4.0 simulator system, which offers access to over 150 virtual golf courses. The academy specializes in golf instruction for players of all skill levels, with certified instructors available for one-on-one and group lessons, as well as on-course coaching sessions. The facility is open daily from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman 4.0 technology for accurate data and feedback
Wide variety of virtual golf courses for entertainment and practice
Comprehensive lesson programs for all skill levels with certified instructors

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor with ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated, but patrons are assumed to bring their own clubs as it is a golf academy and simulator facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, suggesting a BYOB policy, though this is not confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 virtual holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers golf camps and lessons, indicating it is suitable for junior golfers and youth.
